name: STS2 Fatigue
author: Tomorrowcup
description: 杀戮尖塔2疲劳模式：当回合中抽牌堆为空时，抽牌将消耗生命值，而不是洗混弃牌堆。第 n 张抽牌会消耗 n 点生命值。回合结束时，如果抽牌堆为空，弃牌堆将被重新洗回。When draw pile is empty during a turn, drawing cards will cost HP instead of shuffling discard pile. The nth draw costs n HP. At end of turn, if draw pile is empty, discard pile is shuffled back.
